# Default real-world URL seed corpus for Android share smoke tests.
# Keep entries public, stable, and safe for repeated capture-analysis runs.
# For broader property-style coverage, pass --corpus /path/to/urls.txt or set
# PRECIOUS_SHARE_SMOKE_URL_CORPUS to a generated corpus from Tranco, Common Crawl,
# HTTP Archive, or another source.
